programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: The Old Spanish Trail
programme.desc:
The Old Spanish Trail is a documentary film about the historic trail tracking the journey of Richard Waller Otis Calef and Jim Clark on horseback 1200 miles from Los Angeles to Santa Fe They rode the trail in two legs fall of 2014 and summer of 2015
The Old Spanish Trail witnessed a brief but furious heyday between 1830 and 1848 as a trade route linking Santa Fe New Mexico and Los Angeles California The riders run into problems staying true to trail because of highways and private land during their ride tracing the past The film is a reminder to all of us to protect and preserve the natural landscape and its trails

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A young football star begins to have nightmares about a serial killer called The Springwood Chopper after finding his last victim Each dream reveals more of the killer until he is blamed for the killings Now his girlfriend begins to experience the same dreamswho is the killer

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A TV shock journalist gives an on-air tour of an eerie haunted house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Mean retirement home nurse Jane Reynolds runs the night shift with an iron fist and makes extra money selling the residents jewelry to pawnshops Jane and boyfriend Johnny try to steal a new patients sparkling ring and trouble begins

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: After a shooting a young teenage boy on the run from police stumbles into a hotel where the tenants are not normal

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.desc: Nick and Schanke are followed by a crew from a reality television show When Nick is caught vamping vampire enforcers try to kill all who saw

programme.title: Night of the Demons
programme.desc: Night of the Demons is a 1988 American supernatural horror film directed by Kevin S Tenney written and produced by Joe Augustyn and starring Amelia Kinkade Cathy Podewell Linnea Quigley Hal Havins and Alvin Alexis

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carters mission

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper trains Gilligan to be his replacement leader in case he is captured by savages But when The Skipper is actually captured by savages can Gilligan actually take control

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The rock band The Mosquitoes arrive on the island for some much-needed RR But the castaways try to make their lives miserable so theyll want to leave--and take them with them

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Lukes efforts to help Hassie win the attention of the most popular boy in school backfire but for unexpected reasons

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E03
programme.desc: Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden while Mr Drysdale Miss Hathaway and a stubborn mule try to stop her

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: It was a dark and stormy night when BJ and the Bear drove two Transylvanian coffins from Frisco to LA meeting up along the way with murder mayhem and maybe even Count Dracula

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur lands in a Mexican jail and Mister Ed is the only crime witness that can help to set him free

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In order to steal enough explosives to blow up a difficult bridge Hogans men paint anti-Nazi graffiti on the camps ammo building

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Fed up with a lack of respect from The Crew and low on self-esteem Parker puts in for a transfer But complications develop when McHale and The Boys work up a scheme to try to make him change his mind

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A new Navy Directive - Which states that all overweight Combat Officers are to be shipped out - Prompts Binghamton to see that McHale puts on an extra 6 pounds - Enough to put him over the limit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer accompanies his friend Frankie to his home for the weekend While there Gomer sings a love song to Frankies sister who is engaged to a local fellow who is not in a rush to get married Frankie and his mother use this as an opportunity to move the fellow to the altar

programme.title: The St Valentines Day Massacre
programme.desc: Follows the chronicles of gang wars held in Chicago in the early twenties between the Southside Mob and the Northside Gang Al Capone forms a team to permanently get rid of his arch rival Moran

programme.title: Cell 2455 Death Row
programme.desc: Whit condemned and awaiting execution reviews the events of his life that has brought him to Cell 2455 on San Quentins Death Row a story he had told in a autobiography that became a sensational best-seller As a boy the young Whit stole groceries to help feed his impoverished family later moving on into major crime to impress a young gang moll Jo-Anne and turns into a cold-blooded thug when he is repudiated by the girl he loves Doll And by his own lawyer when he is arrested and tried as the infamous Lovers Lane Bandit In cell 2455 he studies law to the point where he wins stay after stay twice within minutes of his scheduled execution

programme.title: Mikey And Nick
programme.desc: Nicky is on the run from the mob and he turns to old pal Mikey for help

programme.title: The Retrievers-1
programme.desc: The Retrievers-1

programme.title: Dangerous Crossing
programme.desc: A recently married heiress Ruth Stanton Jeanne Crain embarks on a honeymoon cruise with her new husband John Bowman Carl Betz However shortly after getting on board John disappears None of the crew remember seeing him and the ships manifest has Ruth registered alone and under her maiden name Ruth wanders the boat in search of John but soon the captain and crew believe Ruth must be crazy Only kindly Dr Manning Michael Rennie takes her seriously and helps unravel the mystery

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 35 Fractured Fairy Tales Pinocchio Peabodys Improbably History First Kentucky Derby Rocky Bullwinkle Jet Fuel Part 36

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss unveils his new ally His college-educated nephew Hughie Hogg Hughie turns out to be even more corrupt than his uncle proving it with a scheme to frame Uncle Jesse in a car-stripping ring

programme.title: Hercules 213
programme.desc: Hercules 213

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam and Augur are in a Taelon shuttle craft when something happens they get thrown into a parallel universe They discover that humanity is at war with the Taelons Theyre taken by the rebels and discover that Sandovals counterpart leads them And Lilis works for the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren manipulate a Corporate magnate by seemingly restoring his health into selling them a top city newspaper he controls to give the aliens a tool for propaganda

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane trades bodies with Swamp Thing after setting a trap using Will as bait

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane creates two cyborgs to hunt down the sole survivor of Dr Woodrues experiment

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Ships engineer Patrick Osgood believes he can obtain tiranuim to make a new heart for his sick wife Michelle from the catacombs of the moon using explosives The explosion which follows gives him a vision of the future in which the moon is destroyed by a fireball and a sudden heat storm strikes Though Helena is making a new heart for Michelle its repeated failures cause Osgood to become impatient Convinced he is his wifes only salvation he drags Michelle down into the catacombs giving Koenig a double task - to avoid the fireball and save the Osgoods

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: During a fur trapping trip Cheyenne joins with old Hoot Hollister who plans to return to St Louis to marry his girlfriend While on a riverboat to St Louis he and Cheyenne get mixed up with a teacher and crooked gamblers

programme.title: Young 308
programme.desc: Young 308

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A wealthy woman whose daughter is kidnapped and held for ransom has more faith in a female psychic than Stone and Keller

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IM force is tasked to prevent a rigged election in a small Latin American nation from happening and enabling the results to be genuine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E28
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E28

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Pardoned after a long imprisonment for a crime he didnt commit a man has Jarrods help in adjusting to being free again The man is hired to work at the ranch and after having doubt planted by one of the hands his fear of returning to prison may lead to the death of the man who was the Prosecuting Attorney in the his case- Jarrod

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyennes life is saved by a marshal who hires him as a deputy The marshal is headed to the town of South Ford to arrest a man wanted for murder in Kansas The reception they receive is chilly with Cheyenne questioning his decision

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: 315 the Moment of Truth
programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.title: Tiger Warsaw
programme.desc: Chuck brought sorrow to his family when he shot his father who is now a semi-invalid After 15 years of self destruction he returns home to seek forgiveness

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Herc he falls into a trap set by Saw Boss when he wins a bet and the map to Dream World Helicia keeper of Dream World must accept them or face destruction from Saw Boss Everything goes beautifully

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root is starting to wither and the only cure for it is a dose of the ion winds on Solarus II a planet controlled by Saw Boss He destroyed the Solarian people and now uses the healing powers of the winds for his vines

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: The Golden Antlers of Artemis said to be able to lead the owner to gold are stolen from a monetary in Greece MASK lays a trap for VENOM to get the antlers back

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Dr Choi is kidnapped by a giant mechanical scorpion VENOM forces him to help them locate the lost treasure of Kubla Khan hidden inside the Great Wall of China

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Baseball World Captain N is playing baseball with Bo Jackson until Mother Brain kidnaps Princess Lana and warps Captain N Simon Duke Megaman Kid Icarus and Bo into the cellars How can they get out and save Lana

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Captain N and Megaman are in Megaland trying to defeat Topman but when it was defeated Captain N and Megaman argue which dog was best Duke or Rush which gives Dr Wily an idea to stop the heroes while working on a peace robot

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents sabotage a US space shuttle by planting a bomb on board Inspector Gadget foils MADs plans and saves the space shuttle Safety Tip Breakfast is the most important meal of the day

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: While on a trip in Africa Inspector Gadget Penny and Brain suspect that MAD agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle Inspector Gadget investigates the situation Safety Tip Be prepared when you go exploring

programme.desc: The destabilized energy crystal has an unexpected effect on the struggle between good and evil on Gobotron
